ddls:
CREATE TABLE "participants" (
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each participant */,
  "group_id" TEXT /* Identifier for the group to which the participant belongs */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the participant */,
  "handedness" TEXT /* Handedness of the participant (L for left, R for right) */,
  "iq" INTEGER /* IQ score of the participant */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the participant */,
  "education_level" TEXT /* Highest education level achieved */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the participant */,
  "consent_form_signed" INTEGER /* Indicates if the participant has signed the consent form */,
  "contact_information" TEXT /* Contact information for the participant */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or observations about the participant */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("participant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_participants_group_id FOREIGN KEY ("group_id") REFERENCES groups ("group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "groups" (
  "group_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each group */,
  "group_name" TEXT /* Name of the group */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the group's purpose or focus */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the group was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date of the last update for the group */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the group (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "studies" (
  "study_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each study */,
  "study_name" TEXT /* Name of the study */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the study objectives and methods */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the study */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the study */,
  "principal_investigator" TEXT /* Name of the principal investigator */,
  "budget" TEXT /* Budget allocated for the study */,
  "funding_source" TEXT /* Source of funding for the study */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the study (e.g., planned, ongoing, completed) */,
  "results_summary" TEXT /* Summary of the study results */,
  "published" INTEGER /* Indicates if the study has been published */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("study_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "participant_study" (
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the participant involved in the study */,
  "study_id" INTEGER /* ID of the study that the participant is part of */,
  "role_in_study" TEXT /* Participant's role in the study (e.g., subject, control) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date the participant started participating in the study */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date the participant completed the study */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the participant in the study (e.g., active, dropped out) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("participant_id", "study_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, analyst, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for secure authentication */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the last login */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time of the last update for the user account */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the user account (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
